title: Parma

{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Mandalorian |image=[[File:Parma.jpg]] |name=Parma |homeworld=[[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]][[Star Wars (1977) 68|''Star Wars'' (1977) 68]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Yo, Parma! How's the leg?"
"Workin' like new, Fenn! Ya set it just perfect!|Fenn Shysa and Parma|}} '''Parma''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] freedom fighter who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]]. He served under [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protector]] [[Fenn Shysa]], who set his broken leg after one skirmish. Parma was present when [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] visited [[Mandalorian forest encampment|Shysa's forest base]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 68|''Star Wars'' (1977) 68]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 68}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |pl=Parma }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Mandalorian Protectors]] [[Category:Resistance fighters]]
